name: Carina Lopez
title: Hair Designer
bio:
As the oldest of five daughters, I understand the importance of feeling beautiful, relaxed, and pampered. That's why I've dedicated myself to creating an experience that helps my clients feel their best.

I chose Studio One as my professional home because it provides a comfortable and welcoming space for both myself as an artist and for my guests. My goal is to ensure that every client leaves feeling beautiful, confident, and ready to take on anything.

I have been a hairstylist for three years and graduated from Paul Mitchell, one of the top beauty schools. I took my education seriously because I knew this was my passion and what I wanted to do for the rest of my life. I continued my education beyond school and assisted the owner of Studio One, where I refined my skills and perfected my craft. My specialties include color, cuts, and extensions.

When I'm not in the salon, you can often find me at the gym, spending time with my family, or enjoying the beach. I take pride in working on myself both inside and out every day.
note: Carina is currently on maternity leave and will return soon.
